description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and defines a single stage called deploy. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the exact commands: gem install bundler, bundle install, and jekyll build -d public/. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact and to run only on the master branch. The job should deploy the generated site to GitLab Pages. Ensure no services, caches, or extra variables are defined.
